title: polypodium loriceum var. plesiosorum
intro: Polypodium loriceum var. plesiosorum, also known as Polypodium plesiosorum, is a rare species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. It is primarily found in tropical regions and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds, as well as treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, Polypodium loriceum var. plesiosorum is often used in the form of tea, decoctions, or infusions, and is also sometimes applied topically to the skin as a paste or poultice.
